summary: Iteration 34 - Services Page (6 Operational Areas) testing. All 22 frontend tests passed. Services page renders correctly at /services with all 6 area cards, accordion behavior, expanded content with 'Cosa fa Herion qui' block, procedure cards with entity names/SPID badges/duration labels, and bottom guidance section.
critical_code_review_comments: ServicesPage.jsx is well-structured with clear AREAS definition containing all 6 operational areas

All required data-testid attributes are present and correctly named (services-page, services-title, area-card-*, area-toggle-*, area-catalog-link-*, area-new-practice-*, services-guidance, services-explore-catalog, services-support-link)
Italian text content is complete and professional in tone
Accordion behavior works correctly - only one area expanded at a time
Procedure cards show entity name, SPID auth badge, and duration labels correctly
Bottom guidance section provides clear navigation options
Sidebar nav item 'Aree operative' correctly links to /services
Dynamic data loading from /api/catalog and /api/practices works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested Services Page (6 Operational Areas). All tests passed. Key verified: (1) Services page renders at /services with data-testid='services-page'. (2) Page title 'Aree operative' shown with data-testid='services-title'. (3) All 6 area cards render: area-card-fiscal, area-card-planning, area-card-company, area-card-strategic, area-card-entities, area-card-guidance. (4) Each area card shows title, subtitle, description, and stats (procedure count, official count). (5) Clicking area card expands it showing 'Cosa fa Herion qui' block and procedure list. (6) Expanded area shows catalog link (area-catalog-link-*) and new practice button (area-new-practice-*). (7) Procedure cards show entity name (Agenzia delle Entrate), auth method (SPID badge), and duration (giorni lavorativi/Immediato). (8) Bottom guidance section renders with data-testid='services-guidance'. (9) Sidebar shows 'Aree operative' nav item linking to /services. (10) Expand/collapse toggle works for each area (area-toggle-*). (11) Only one area expanded at a time (accordion behavior verified). (12) Guidance section links navigate correctly to /catalog and /support.

details: data-testid='area-card-fiscal' renders with title, subtitle, description, stats
Only one area expanded at a time - clicking new area collapses previous
'Cosa fa Herion qui' block visible in expanded area
'Procedure correlate' section shows up to 8 related procedures
Entity name (Agenzia delle Entrate) shown on procedure cards
SPID auth method badge shown on official procedures
data-testid='services-guidance' renders with 'Non sai da dove partire?' text
data-testid='nav-services' shows 'Aree operative' and links to /services
All Italian text verified: Aree operative, Gestione fiscale e contabile, Cosa fa Herion qui, Procedure correlate, Vedi catalogo, Nuova pratica, Non sai da dove partire, etc.
